name: Ace of Cups
uprightMeaning: New emotional beginnings, overflowing love, spiritual connection, and the pure gift of the heart offered freely.
reversedMeaning: Emotional blockages, repressed feelings, an inability to receive love, or a new connection that is being resisted.

name: Two of Cups
uprightMeaning: Union, partnership, mutual attraction, and the beautiful symmetry of two hearts recognizing one another.
reversedMeaning: Imbalance in relationships, separation, one-sided connection, or a partnership that has lost its equal footing.

name: Three of Cups
uprightMeaning: Celebration, community, friendship, and the joy of gathering with those whose presence lifts your spirit.
reversedMeaning: Overindulgence, isolation, or gossip and superficiality within a social circle.

name: Four of Cups
uprightMeaning: Apathy, contemplation, withdrawal, and the danger of becoming so inward that new blessings go unseen.
reversedMeaning: Emerging from stagnation, renewed motivation, or finally noticing the opportunity that was always present.

name: Five of Cups
uprightMeaning: Loss, grief, regret, and the sorrow of focusing on what has spilled while two cups still stand behind you.
reversedMeaning: Acceptance, moving on, forgiveness, and the willingness to turn toward what remains.

name: Six of Cups
uprightMeaning: Nostalgia, innocence, childhood memories, and the sweetness of reuniting with what once nourished the soul.
reversedMeaning: Living in the past, inability to grow beyond old patterns, or naivety that prevents moving forward.

name: Seven of Cups
uprightMeaning: Fantasy, illusion, choices in the mist, and the necessity of discerning what is truly real amid seductive dreams.
reversedMeaning: Clarity emerging from confusion, aligning with a clear vision, or cutting through delusion with purposeful action.

name: Eight of Cups
uprightMeaning: Abandonment, withdrawal, walking away, and the courageous act of leaving behind what no longer serves the deeper self.
reversedMeaning: Returning to a situation, fear of abandonment, or difficulty letting go of what has already served its purpose.

name: Nine of Cups
uprightMeaning: Contentment, satisfaction, gratitude, and the quiet radiance of wishes fulfilled and a life savored fully.
reversedMeaning: Dissatisfaction despite outward success, or smugness and overindulgence that obscures deeper fulfillment.

name: Ten of Cups
uprightMeaning: Harmony, joy, domestic bliss, and the enduring happiness that flows from authentic connection and belonging.
reversedMeaning: Disharmony, disruption of peace, or the gap between ideal family/community and lived reality.
